description: UBM knowledge source change detection, extraction, split check, and report flow.

phases.title: Source diff detection
phases.output: NEW/MODIFIED source list excluding goal-setting records
phases.gate: registry hash comparison completes; missing vault produces a zero-change report

phases.title: Knowledge extraction
phases.condition: dry_run == false and NEW/MODIFIED source count > 0
phases.output: updated knowledge JSON, router.json, registry.json, and sync-log.jsonl
phases.gate: each processed source has extracted_entry_ids and sync-log entry; batches are limited to 20 files

phases.title: Knowledge split check
phases.gate: no knowledge JSON exceeds the 500-line hard guard

phases.title: Sync report
phases.output: NEW/MODIFIED counts, destinations, split actions, dry-run status, and residual risks
phases.gate: report includes counts, changed paths, skipped paths, dry-run status, and next action when any gate failed

phases.title: Knowledge relation extraction and dependency graph validation
phases.output: knowledge-relation-extractor (read-only) returns candidate directed edges as JSON; the caller materializes them to eval-log and validate-knowledge-graph.py --merge-relations idempotently merges them into knowledge/knowledge-relations.json by canonical key (source_id,target_id,relation_type), preserving existing edges (first-write-wins), then writes both knowledge/knowledge-relations.json and the regenerated knowledge/knowledge-graph.json only on validation PASS (atomic)
phases.gate: validate-knowledge-graph.py exits 0: edge source_id/target_id reference existing entries, no self-loop, depends_on graph is acyclic, each edge has evidence>=1, confidence in 0..1, and review_status; related associations are undirected and cycle-exempt
phases.note: knowledge-relations.json / knowledge-graph.json は本 phase の produced output であり事前存在しない (resourceIds には載せない): C08 は書込せず候補を返すのみ・永続化 owner は validate-knowledge-graph.py --merge-relations
